raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch uhs Ben-
jamina Wahrtim nahze/ tad bi-
ja tur to Sargu Wirſneeks/
Jerijus Wahṛda/ tas Dehts Se-
lemtius/ ta Dehla Kananijus/
tas grabbe to Praweetu Jeremi-
ju/ un fazzija: Tu gribbi teem
Kaldeëreem peeḱriſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus fazzija:
Tas ne irr teefa/ es ne eefhu pee
teem Kaldeëreem. Bet tas wiꞥ-
ſchu ne klaufija/ un Jerijus ta-
grabbe Jeremiju/un wedde to pee
teem Leel-Kungeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Leel-Kungi apskai-
tahs pahr Jeremiju / un titte
wiꞥſchu/ un likke winnu Zeetu-
ma Namina/ eekſch Jonatana ta
Rakſtitaja Namma/ jo to bija
tee par Zeetuma Namimu darrij-
fcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta gabje Jeremijus us
to Namimu eekſch tahs Bedres/
un eekſch teem Kambareem/ un
tur fehdeja Jeremijus dauds
Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tasKehniſch
Zedeſtius/ un likke wiꞥſchu atwest/
un tas Kehniſch waizaja wiꞥ-
su tawa Namina pasleppeni /
un fazzija: Irrag tahds Wahṛds
no ta KUNGA? Un Jeremijus
fazzija: Irr. Un wiꞥſch fazzija:
Tu tapſi tam Kehnimam no Ba-
beles Rohkā dohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus fazzija us
to Kehnimu Zedeſtju : Ko ejmu es
rehkojs prett tewi/ jeb prett ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kur nu irr juhsu Pran-
ſchi? kas jums irr fluddinajſſa
un fazzijſcht: Tas Kehniſch
Babeles prett jums ne nah-
neds prett ſcho Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ klauti jelle/
Kungs Kehniſch! laid jelle ma
na Lubgſchana preekſch ter
Weetu dabba/ un ne wedd ma
ni atpakkat Jonatana ta K
ſtitaja Namina/ ka es tur ne
mirſtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad patwehleja tas K
niſch Zedeſtius/ ka Jeremiju
Zeetuma Pagalina turreht/
winnam tappe ikdeenas wee
Maisee Reezenis dohts no
Zeppeju Eelas/ teekams wi
Maise eekſch ta Pilſtahta bij
ehsta. Ta palikke Jeremii
eekſch ta Zeetuma Pagalinja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "weem Kalpeem/ jeb prett ſch
Laudim/ ka juhs manni e
Zeetuma Namina likkuschi?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
